common.fillAllFields: Please fill in all mandatory fields.
common.deleteDocumentDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.
common.fillRequired: Please fill in the required fields correctly.
common.confirmLogoutDescription: Are you sure you want to end your session?
common.logoutWarning: All your active session data will be cleared and you will be redirected to the login page.

titleStep.title: Dashboard Overview
titleStep.description: This is your central command center. Get a real-time snapshot of all logistics operations, KPIs, and alerts at a glance.

kpiStep.title: Key Performance Indicators
kpiStep.description: These cards show your most important metrics: active shipments, delayed orders, fleet status, driver activity, and warehouse utilization.

dailyOpsStep.title: Daily Operations
dailyOpsStep.description: Track today's operational metrics including planned routes, completed deliveries, failed deliveries, average delivery time, and fuel consumption.

actionRequiredStep.title: Action Required
actionRequiredStep.description: Items that need your immediate attention — delayed shipments, expiring documents, or maintenance alerts. Click any item to take action.

mapStep.title: Live Operations Map
mapStep.description: See all your warehouses, vehicles, and customers on an interactive map. Track fleet positions and delivery progress in real time.

tableStep.title: Vehicle Fleet
tableStep.description: View and manage all vehicles in your fleet. Filter by status, type, or location. Click a row to see vehicle details.

addStep.title: Add Vehicle
addStep.description: Register a new vehicle to your fleet. Fill in specifications, assign to a warehouse, and upload documents.

tableStep.title: Shipment Management
tableStep.description: Track all shipments and their statuses. Use filters to find specific shipments by status, date, or customer.

addStep.title: Create Shipment
addStep.description: Create a new shipment order. Specify origin, destination, cargo details, and assign a vehicle and driver.

headerStep.title: Analytics Dashboard
headerStep.description: Deep-dive into your operational performance. Select time ranges and export reports for stakeholder review.

gaugesStep.title: Performance Gauges
gaugesStep.description: Visual indicators for on-time delivery rate, fleet utilization, and customer satisfaction scores against targets.

forecastStep.title: AI Forecasting
forecastStep.description: Machine learning-powered shipment volume predictions. Compare actual vs predicted trends to plan capacity ahead.

costStep.title: Cost Analysis
costStep.description: Break down operational costs by category — fuel, maintenance, and overhead — with trend analysis over time.

tableStep.title: Warehouse Management
tableStep.description: View all warehouses, their capacity utilization, locations, and operational status.

addStep.title: Add Warehouse
addStep.description: Register a new warehouse location with address, capacity, operating hours, and contact details.

tableStep.title: Driver Management
tableStep.description: Manage your driver roster. View license status, availability, performance ratings, and assigned vehicles.

addStep.title: Add Driver
addStep.description: Register a new driver with license details, contact info, and vehicle assignment.

tableStep.title: Route Planning
tableStep.description: View and manage delivery routes. See route details, stops, estimated times, and assigned vehicles.

addStep.title: Create Route
addStep.description: Plan a new delivery route by adding stops, assigning vehicles, and setting estimated arrival times.

tableStep.title: Inventory Overview
tableStep.description: Track stock levels across all warehouses. Monitor SKUs, quantities, and reorder points.

addStep.title: Add Inventory Item
addStep.description: Add new inventory items with SKU, category, warehouse assignment, and stock thresholds.

tableStep.title: Customer Directory
tableStep.description: Manage your customer database. View contact details, shipping addresses, and order history.

addStep.title: Add Customer
addStep.description: Register a new customer with company details, contact information, and delivery preferences.

contentStep.title: Reports Center
contentStep.description: Generate and view operational reports. Export data in various formats for compliance and analysis.

sidebarStep.title: Navigation Menu
sidebarStep.description: Use this menu to quickly switch between Dashboard, Scan, Tasks, Capacity, and Activity views.

dashboardPicksStep.title: Key Performance Indicators
dashboardPicksStep.description: Track your daily picking and packing progress against your targets.

dashboardControlStep.title: Zone Control
dashboardControlStep.description: Change your active working zone to receive relevant tasks and alerts.

dashboardQuickStep.title: Quick Actions
dashboardQuickStep.description: Instantly report issues or request restocks for your active zone.

scanSectionStep.title: Barcode Scanner
scanSectionStep.description: Scan product barcodes or SKUs here to log movements into the system.

taskListStep.title: Your Task Queue
taskListStep.description: Manage your assigned tasks, prioritizing items marked as 'HIGH'.

capacityChartStep.title: Overall Capacity
capacityChartStep.description: A high-level view of how many pallet positions are currently occupied in the entire facility.

capacityZoneStep.title: Zone Breakdown
capacityZoneStep.description: Detailed breakdown of capacity utilization per zone. Helps identify bottlenecks.

activityFeedStep.title: Live Activity
activityFeedStep.description: Real-time feed of all inventory movements happening across the site.

auth.signInDescription: Please enter your credentials to access your account.
auth.signUpDescription: Please provide your basic details to get started.
auth.profileDescription: Almost there! Complete your profile to join the LogiTrack team.
auth.termsAgreement: By clicking "Complete Registration", you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Your account will be created and you're redirected to the dashboard.

landing.metaDescription: Orchestrate every shipment with live intelligence. Synchronize dispatch, fleets, and customer promises in one immersive dashboard.

hero.titleMain: Orchestrate every shipment with live intelligence
hero.description: Synchronize dispatch, fleets, and customer promises in one immersive dashboard. Forecast issues before they happen and keep routes optimized with predictive AI.

telemetry.title: LIVE TELEMETRY FEED
telemetry.efficiencyIncreased: Efficiency increased by {value} based on current traffic.

features.title: Everything you need for end-to-end visibility.
features.description: Coordinate dispatch, drivers, and customer updates with intelligent workflows designed for complex logistics operations.

smartRoute.title: Smart Route Planning
smartRoute.desc: Optimize deliveries with live traffic and warehouse capacity data to cut delays.

predictiveEta.title: Predictive ETAs
predictiveEta.desc: Accurately forecast arrival times with AI-powered scheduling models.

driverPerf.title: Driver Performance
driverPerf.desc: Track utilization, safety metrics, and compliance from a unified dashboard.

exceptionAlerts.title: Exception Alerts
exceptionAlerts.desc: React instantly to disruptions with automated notifications and workflows.

workflow.desc1: Integrate telematics, TMS, and WMS data sources in minutes with prebuilt connectors.
workflow.desc2: Monitor every shipment and asset in real time with adaptive dashboards and heatmaps.
workflow.desc3: Trigger proactive workflows, alerts, and customer updates before issues escalate.
workflow.desc4: Leverage AI-driven route optimization to minimize fuel costs, idle time, and delays.
workflow.desc5: Evaluate KPIs such as delivery accuracy, driver efficiency, and cost per shipment with analytics tools.
workflow.desc6: Expand your logistics network confidently with modular integrations and scalable infrastructure.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your logistics operations?
cta.description: Partner with Logi-Track to unlock real-time visibility, predictive intelligence, and exceptional customer experiences.

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for local fleet owners and individual operators.

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: Optimized for regional logistics and growing teams.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom solutions for global supply chain leaders.

infrastructure.title: Enterprise-Grade Security & Performance
infrastructure.description: Need more than 10,000 routes per month? Our Global infrastructure handles millions of telemetry events per second with 99.99% uptime. Contact our engineering team for custom integration solutions and volume-based pricing.

footer.tos: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All plans subject to our TOS.
footer.support: Enterprise customers get dedicated support channels.

featuresPage.heroSubtitle: From predictive telemetry to autonomous warehouse orchestration, explore the tools redefining what it means to be a global logistics leader.

routeOptimization.title: AI Route Optimization
routeOptimization.description: Our proprietary AI engine processes live traffic, weather, and fleet capacity to generate the most fuel-efficient routes in real-time.

warehouse.title: Warehouse Intelligence
warehouse.description: Optimize pick-paths and vertical space utilization with automated WMS synchronization. Scale from 1 to 100 warehouses with ease.

telemetry.title: Real-Time Telemetry
telemetry.description: Monitor vehicle health, driver safety, and fuel consumption via integrated telematics. Convert raw data into actionable insights.

alerts.title: Smart Exception Alerts
alerts.description: Stop reacting to disasters. Our anomaly detection system flags potential delays before they happen, suggesting proactive rerouting.

compliance.title: Enterprise Compliance
compliance.description: Automatic audit logs, geofencing, and chain-of-custody tracking. Built to meet the strictest logistics security standards.

api.title: API-First Architecture
api.description: Integrate with SAP, Oracle, or custom legacy systems in hours, not weeks, using our robust SDK and webhook infrastructure.

infrastructure.title: One Dashboard. Infinite Control.
infrastructure.description: Our features aren't standalone tools—they are part of a deeply integrated ecosystem. When your warehouse updates, your fleet reacts. When traffic spikes, your customer knows. That is the Logi-Track advantage.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.
footer.builtFor: Built for the enterprise, optimized for the road.

mission.title: Orchestrating the Future of Global Trade.
mission.subtitle: At LogiTrack, we don’t just track shipments—we synchronize entire supply chains. Our mission is to transform fragmented logistics data into live intelligence.

vision.title: Eliminating the blind spots in modern logistics.
vision.description: Born from the intersection of AI innovation and operational expertise, LogiTrack was built to solve the most complex challenges in freight and warehouse management. We envision a world where every vehicle, warehouse, and shipment is part of a unified, self-optimizing ecosystem.

resilience.title: Predictive Resilience
resilience.description: We anticipate disruptions before they escalate. Our AI models analyze live traffic and capacity to keep your SLA at 98%+.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.description: Empowering every stakeholder with a single source of truth. From the driver’s cab to the C-suite, total visibility is standard.

efficiency.title: Scalable Efficiency
efficiency.description: Built to grow with your network. Whether managing a local fleet or a global supply chain, our infrastructure scales seamlessly.

why.title: Why We Do It
why.subtitle: In an era of instant expectations, logistics is no longer a back-office function—it is a competitive advantage. LogiTrack provides the tools to turn that advantage into a market-leading reality.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.

hero.title: How LogiTrack Works
hero.subtitle: A comprehensive, end-to-end logistics orchestration platform designed to scale with your business needs.

cta.title: Ready to Optimize?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of companies that have modernized their logistics with LogiTrack.

hero.title: Real-Time Visibility Across Every Continent.
hero.subtitle: Monitor your entire fleet and shipments in real-time with sub-second precision across 190+ countries and territories.

liveMap.title: Live Map Intelligence
liveMap.description: Interactive globe with real-time asset positions, geofenced zones, and predictive route overlays powered by satellite and cellular networks.

multiModal.title: Multi-Modal Tracking
multiModal.description: Seamlessly track assets across road, rail, air, and sea with automatic carrier handoff detection and unified timeline views.

alerts.title: Instant Deviation Alerts
alerts.description: AI-powered anomaly detection flags route deviations, unauthorized stops, and ETA changes before they impact your operations.

cta.title: Start Tracking Globally
cta.subtitle: Deploy real-time tracking across your entire logistics network in under 48 hours.

hero.title: AI-Powered Route Optimization at Scale.
hero.subtitle: Reduce fuel costs by up to 23% and delivery times by 18% with our proprietary machine learning route engine.

predictive.title: Predictive Traffic Analysis
predictive.description: Our models process historical and live traffic patterns to anticipate congestion hours before it impacts your fleet.

dynamic.title: Dynamic Re-Routing
dynamic.description: Automatically reroute vehicles in real-time based on weather, road closures, and delivery priority changes.

carbon.title: Carbon-Aware Routing
carbon.description: Optimize not just for time and cost, but also for environmental impact with integrated carbon footprint calculations.

detail.title: Built on millions of data points.
detail.description: Our route intelligence engine processes over 50 million route calculations daily, continuously learning from real-world delivery outcomes to improve accuracy.

cta.title: Optimize Your Routes
cta.subtitle: See how AI-driven routing can transform your delivery operations.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Every Sensor. Every Signal. One Dashboard.
hero.subtitle: Aggregate and analyze telemetry data from thousands of IoT devices, vehicles, and warehouse sensors in real-time.

vehicleHealth.title: Vehicle Health Monitoring
vehicleHealth.description: Track engine diagnostics, tire pressure, brake wear, and fuel consumption across your entire fleet with predictive maintenance alerts.

coldChain.title: Cold Chain Compliance
coldChain.description: Monitor temperature, humidity, and shock sensors for perishable goods with automatic compliance reporting and breach notifications.

driverSafety.title: Driver Safety Scores
driverSafety.description: Real-time driver behavior analysis including harsh braking, speeding, and fatigue detection with actionable coaching insights.

detail.title: From sensor to insight in milliseconds.
detail.description: Our edge-to-cloud telemetry pipeline processes raw sensor data through noise filtering, anomaly detection, and contextual enrichment before surfacing actionable intelligence.

cta.title: Connect Your Fleet
cta.subtitle: Hardware-agnostic integration with 200+ telematics devices and IoT platforms.

hero.title: Zero-Trust Security for Mission-Critical Logistics.
hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade protection with 256-bit AES encryption, SOC 2 Type II compliance, and continuous threat monitoring.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: All data in transit and at rest is protected with AES-256 encryption. TLS 1.3 enforced across all API endpoints and client connections.

accessControl.title: Granular Access Control
accessControl.description: Role-based access with multi-factor authentication, IP whitelisting, and session management. Full audit trail for every action.

compliance.title: Global Compliance
compliance.description: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR, and PCI-DSS certified. Automated compliance reporting and continuous security assessments.

detail.title: 24/7 security operations center.
detail.description: Our dedicated security team monitors for threats around the clock, with automated incident response and real-time vulnerability scanning across all infrastructure layers.

cta.subtitle: Download our SOC 2 report and security whitepaper.

integration.title: Deep ERP Integration
integration.description: Native connectors for SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, and custom legacy systems. Full bidirectional data sync in real-time.

visibility.title: Full Chain Visibility
visibility.description: Track every node in your supply chain from origin to destination. Real-time inventory levels, in-transit goods, and delivery confirmations.

vendor.title: Vendor Management

multiModal.title: Multi-Modal Coordination
multiModal.description: Seamlessly manage ocean freight, air cargo, rail, and ground transport with intelligent mode-shifting recommendations.

sustainability.title: Sustainable Logistics
sustainability.description: Every route we optimize reduces carbon emissions. We are committed to making global supply chains environmentally responsible by 2030.

architecture.title: Cloud-Native Architecture
architecture.description: Kubernetes-orchestrated microservices deployed across 12 global regions with automatic failover and horizontal scaling.

data.title: Real-Time Data Pipeline
data.description: Apache Kafka and custom stream processors handle 10 million events per second with sub-millisecond latency.

ml.title: Machine Learning at Scale
ml.description: Our ML platform trains and deploys models continuously, processing petabytes of logistics data to power predictive intelligence.

detail.title: We give back to the community.

hero.title: Your Data, Your Rights.
hero.subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data with full transparency and in compliance with global regulations.

collection.title: Data We Collect
collection.description: We collect only the data necessary to provide our services: account information, shipment data, device telemetry, and usage analytics. No data is sold to third parties.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.description: You have the right to access, correct, delete, and export your data at any time. We support GDPR, CCPA, and other regional privacy frameworks.

security.title: How We Protect Your Data
security.description: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit using AES-256 and TLS 1.3. We maintain SOC 2 Type II certification and conduct regular third-party security audits.

detail.title: Built for global privacy standards.
detail.description: Our platform is designed from the ground up to comply with GDPR, CCPA, PIPEDA, and other international privacy regulations. Data residency options available for all enterprise accounts.

cta.title: Questions About Privacy?
cta.subtitle: Contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@logitrack.io.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Our Commitment to Reliability.
hero.subtitle: Industry-leading uptime guarantees, transparent incident reporting, and clear escalation paths for every service tier.

uptime.title: 99.99% Uptime Guarantee
uptime.description: Our platform maintains 99.99% availability across all regions, backed by multi-region redundancy, automatic failover, and real-time health monitoring.

response.title: Incident Response Times
response.description: Critical incidents: 15 min response, 1 hour resolution target. High priority: 1 hour response, 4 hour resolution target. Standard: 4 hour response.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.description: Real-time status page, post-incident reports within 48 hours, and monthly uptime reports. We believe in radical transparency about our reliability.

detail.title: If we miss our targets, you do not pay.
detail.description: Should our uptime fall below the guaranteed threshold, affected customers automatically receive service credits. No tickets required — credits are applied proactively.

cta.title: Review Full SLA Terms
cta.subtitle: Download our complete SLA documentation for your records.

footer.copyright: © {year} LogiTrack Intelligence Systems. All rights reserved.

dialogs.locationDetailsDesc: Enter the starting point and destination to calculate the route metrics.
dialogs.optimizationDesc: This route currently avoids major highways. You can adjust the path by dragging the line on the map to avoid traffic or congested areas.
dialogs.assignmentsDesc: Assign an available driver and vehicle to this route.
